dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Beep bop skdoo beh..?

dialogue.speaker: gf-remnants
text: Uh... I'm not sure where we are right now.

dialogue.speaker: gf-remnants
text: I feel like we're entering some sort of Uncharted territory.

dialogue.speaker: proto-bf
text: Wait, say that again.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Oh my god shu- wait...

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Oh my god you're like a Funkin' Remnant.
I love that mod!

dialogue.speaker: proto-bf
text: Oh yeah do you?
Name every Remnant in it!

dialogue.speaker: gf-remnants
text: Uh oh.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants-comedic
text: The Title Music from the FNF Ludum Dare Prototype was reused for Random on Freeplay!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Donate and Kickstarter buttons were brought back!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Unused Goodies! button was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Unused Backspace Graphic was restored in the Menus!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The GF Jingle Easter Egg uses Kawai Sprite's Older Version of the Song!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Input Offsets Menu uses KadeDev's Older Version of the Song!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Unused Lose Graphic was restored when you Game Over!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: BF, GF, and Pico's Character Select Sprites reference their Old Concepts!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Nene's Character Select Sprite references her Unused Idle Facial Expression!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Specific Freeplay Pixel Icons are based on their Older Versions!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: BF's Freeplay Enter Animation restores an Unused Smear Frame!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Freeplay Background Image for Boyfriend is based on Older Version from the Base Game!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: BF's Watching TV Animation references an Older Version of it where he's leaning forward instead of backwards!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico's Freeplay restores his Unused Hair Blowing Animation when getting a good rank!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants!'s Background references an Old Week 1 Background Sketch!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants!'s Freeplay Album Cover references an Old OST Cover Concept!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants Erect!'s Intro directly uses an Old BF Concept Sketch!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants Erect!'s Background restores the Big Top Hat Guy in the crowd!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: That background is also based on the Original Concept Sketch.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Tutorial's Bumper uses an old Phantom Arcade Animation of BF hitting the screen!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: GF's Scrapped Tutorial Intro was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Tutorial's Instrumental references the Old Version of Girlfriend's Jingle!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 1's Bumper uses an old Phantom Arcade Animation of Dad looking away!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Bopeebo references an Unused FNF Song called Give a Lil' Bit Back!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: An extra note in Bopeebo on Dad's side was readded!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Fresh's Old Beatbox Charting was referenced!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Fresh (Boyfriend Remix) was also referenced during Fresh!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Scrapped BF and Dad Fighting Mechanics were restored in DadBattle!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: In Spookeez the Spooky Kids use their Old Unused Idle!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Spooky Kids have their eyes open on the down pose referencing their Old Concepts!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: South's Ending Cutscene references an Unused Monster Design!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Monster's left and right poses being reversed was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 3's Bumper uses an old Phantom Arcade Animation of Pico reloading his gun!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 3's Background uses the Ceiling Hatch, a scrapped prop!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico's Sprite references an old sketch where there's a mic in his gun barrel!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 4's Background is based on an Old Concept with visible buildings!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: An Unused Passing Truck was restored in Week 4's Stage!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Some of the Henchmen use their Old Designs!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Mom's Old down and right poses were restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: High references an Old Beta Version of the song Kawai Sprite teased!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Scrapped Lamp Post Mechanics were restored in M.I.L.F!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 5's Background is based on an Old Concept Sketch!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Snow being Animated for the Ceiling Window in Week 5 was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Winter Horrorland's Intro Cutscene references an old FNF theory where Monster was hiding inside of Santa!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 6's Bumper references a Concept for Week 6's Intro Cutscene!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Senpai's Dialogue references an old Week 6 Teaser that was posted by Moawling!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Thorns's Dialogue references an old Twitter Post by EliteMasterEric!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Original School Design was restored for the Week 6 Background!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Senpai uses his Old Unused Idle Animation!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Boyfriend's Pixel Hey Pose was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Senpai was originally supposed to have heterochromia iridum so his eyes are different colours.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Roses's Old Charting and Scroll Speed were referenced!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Senpai's Secret Dialogue references Unfair Mario 64!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Thorns's Censored Dialogue references dialogue from an old Vs Matt Corruption fan mod!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Tankman uses his Old Idle Animation along with referencing an old sketch where RAP MAN is written on his torso!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Week 7's Background reuses a ton of scrapped ideas, like the sandstorm and falling tankmen!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: In Guns there's a chance for Tankman and BF to ascend as a reference to old FNF memes that do the same!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: GF Face Planting during the Stress Cutscene was restored as a Random Chance Event!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Darnell's Scrapped ABot arm was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Darnell's Intro Cutscene uses Darnell and Nene's Old Laugh Sounds!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico Unused Smile is restored at the end of the Darnell Intro Cutscene!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Lit Up (BF Remnants Mix) is based off of an Old Concept made by Saruky!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico's Unused Shooting Animation was semi-restored in 2hot!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: In Blazin' Pico's Unused Flinch Animation was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The OST Version of Blazin's Ending was restored!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Boyfriend's Loss Results restores Girlfriend's Scrapped Facial Expression when she shrugs!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Pico's Perfect Results restores Nene's Scrapped Facial Expression when she gets kicked!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Old Test Charting Songs Smash and Ridge are referenced in Freeplay!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: April Fools 2021 Song called SugarCrash! was remixed!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Remnants! (Remnants Mix)'s Background, Proto BF & GF reference an Early Week 1 Concept!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Proto BF's Dialogue Sound uses an Old Unedited Version of the Note Miss Sound!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: In Remnants! (Remnants Mix) Proto BF's notes are based off of super old Placeholder Note Graphics!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Proto BF's Hold Animations reference how characters used to jitter while hitting hold notes in Older FNF versions!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Playtime's Background is based off a Scrapped Poppy Playtime area outside of the Playtime Co. Building!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Grieving's Flashbacks reference a ton of old FNF sketches!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Credits reuse an Unused Song called Fresh (Chill Mix)!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: The Credits reuse a ton of old FNF sketches!

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: There's so many other things I haven't mentioned lik-

dialogue.speaker: proto-gf
text: Okay um-

dialogue.speaker: proto-gf
text: Wow.
Who knew Funkin' Remnants had so many Remnants.

dialogue.speaker: proto-gf
text: You'd have to be brain dead to say there wasn't enough!

dialogue.speaker: proto-bf
text: There wasn't enough.

dialogue.speaker: bf-remnants
text: Guess you can't please everyone.
